hooks.command: echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Main thread must not implement directly. Delegate all code edits to agents."}'

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(verify\.sh|test_agent\.py)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Development/debug commands must be delegated to agents."}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'run_pipeline\.py' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q '\-\-skip-qa'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "run_pipeline.py without --skip-qa is a dev/test run. Delegate to agents."}'; fi
